summary: Frontend-only content regression test for PublicOS pre-launch homepage refactor. Validated Landing.jsx, LiveIssuePanel, Footer and i18n (EN/HI/TE). Every requirement in the review passed — no fake numbers/stats/contributor names found, all data-testid hooks render, mission/how-it-works/topics/coverage/community/champions/CTA sections render correctly, ticker shows Civic Promise phrases, promise-panel rotates with 4 dots and 01/04 counter, i18n switches correctly to Hindi & Telugu and all six other routes load without legacy-reference console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.jsx is now ~460 lines and contains 3 sub-components (MissionCard/CoverageCount/CommunityCard/ChampionCategory) inline — acceptable but consider extracting to /components/landing/* for reuse and to keep file <400 lines as it grows.
CoverageCount shows ∞ symbol intentionally (pre-launch); once real counts exist, ensure aria-label/screen-reader text uses 'Coming soon' instead of '∞' to avoid screen reader pronouncing 'infinity'.
LiveIssuePanel auto-rotate interval is 4500ms hard-coded — fine, but consider respecting prefers-reduced-motion to pause animation for accessibility.

Champions section hard-codes 'Recognition launching soon' and 'Be among the first' as English literals inside Landing.jsx — these are not in i18n.js so Hindi/Telugu visitors still see English on those two strings. Minor i18n inconsistency.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Landing page rewrite validated end-to-end. Verified no forbidden strings ('247,893','247K+','1.8M citizens','+18% month','+42,000','284 cities','168,421','5.2d avg','15.6d avg','92 score','CT-2401','Aarav Sharma','TOP_CONTRIBUTORS','Pothole fixed on MG Road','Live Pulse'). All data-testid hooks present: page-landing, hero-cta-report, hero-cta-feed, promise-panel, promise-dot-0..3, mission-section, mission-card-{citizen|transparent|accountable|data}, how-step-01..04, topics-section, topic-topic_{roads|lights|waste|water|traffic|public_spaces|env|transport}, landing-map-cta, community-section, community-{village|town|municipal|smart}, champions-section, cta-final-report, cta-final-join, site-footer, lang-switcher, lang-option-{en|hi|te}. The only console errors observed (2 x 401) are /api/auth/me probing during anonymous visits — unrelated to content refactor. Recommend keeping these in mind for next iteration if auth flow changes.
